CREATE TABLE test_offset (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_offset OFFSET 0.5 FETCH 2 WITH TIES;
SELECT * FROM test_offset OFFSET 1 FETCH 3 ONLY;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_offset) AS subquery OFFSET 2;
SELECT a.id, b.value FROM test_offset AS a JOIN test_offset AS b ON a.id = b.id OFFSET 1;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id FROM test_offset ORDER BY id DESC) AS subquery OFFSET -1;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_offset WHERE id > 2) OFFSET 1;
SELECT * FROM test_offset ORDER BY value FETCH 3 OFFSET 1;
SELECT * FROM test_offset OFFSET 0 FETCH 10 WITH TIES;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_offset ORDER BY id) AS subquery OFFSET 0.1 FETCH 5;
